d:
Aurora summons her unicorn Sonny to her side and drifts into a deep sleep. Sonny inherits [[140%]] of Aurora's HP and [[120%]] of her other [[basic stats]], then creates a rainbow aura that inspires allies. All inspired allied summons gain [[50]] Haste, and their movement becomes smoother, letting them move past enemies and obstacles more easily. This skill can be cast even when Aurora is under control effects.
While asleep, Aurora stays [[invincible]]. For normal attacks, she conjures objects from her dreams and hurls them at enemies to deal [[320%]]<ATK> damage. If Sonny gets defeated in battle, Aurora jolts awake. Once awake, she becomes vulnerable to enemy attacks and can't use any skills except her Ultimate.
Passive. When a battle starts, Aurora immediately falls asleep, and Sonny appears at her side. The frontmost enemy hero gets marked as the Nightmare. The mark reduces their Haste by [[40]], but increases their ATK by [[2%]]. Sonny rallies all allied summons to focus their attacks on the Nightmare.
Sonny inherits [[160%]] of Aurora's HP.
Sonny inherits [[180%]] of Aurora's HP.
Sonny inherits [[200%]] of Aurora's HP.
Sonny inherits [[220%]] of Aurora's HP.

This skill can only be used while Aurora is asleep. Aurora summons a magical bunny beside her that lasts for up to [[12]]s. The magical bunny inherits [[100%]] of Aurora's HP and [[80%]] of her other [[basic stats]], and deals [[100%]]<ATK> damage with its normal attack.
When the magical bunny's duration ends, it leaps at the nearest enemy within 2 tiles and detonates, dealing [[340%]]<ATK> damage to all adjacent enemies.
Increases the bunny's detonation damage to [[370%]]<ATK>.
Increases the bunny's detonation damage to [[400%]]<ATK>.
Increases the bunny's detonation damage to [[430%]]<ATK>.

While Aurora is dreaming, reality within 2 tiles around her slowly gets overtaken by her dream. If an enemy stays in that area for [[12]]s, they will be transformed into a unicorn plushie, leaving them unable to move or attack for [[1]]s.
The longer an enemy remains in the area, the faster each subsequent transformation triggers (minimum [[6]]s). This effect does not apply to [[unaffected]] enemies.
Extends the unicorn plushie transformation duration to [[1.5]]s.
Extends the unicorn plushie transformation duration to [[2]]s.
Extends the unicorn plushie transformation duration to [[2.5]]s.
Aurora increases her ATK by [[10%]] during battle. For every allied summon from a different ally on the battlefield, her ATK increases further by [[1%]], up to [[5]] times.
Aurora increases her ATK by [[13%]] during battle. For every allied summon from a different ally on the battlefield, her ATK increases further by [[1.5%]], up to [[5]] times.
Aurora increases her ATK by [[16%]] during battle. For every allied summon from a different ally on the battlefield, her ATK increases further by [[2%]], up to [[5]] times.

While asleep, Aurora opens her whimsical Dream Theater, boosting the damage of all allied summons by [[4%]] and casting them in special roles.
Melee summons all take on the role of powerful Knights and take [[25%]] less damage.
Ranged summons take on the role of graceful Princesses, allowing their normal attacks to deal extra damage equal to [[20%]] of Aurora's ATK.
As for Sonny, Aurora's unicorn friend, he plays the role of the Prince. He gets both the Knight's and Princess' buffs and becomes [[unaffected]].
Increase all allied summons' damage dealt by [[8%]].
Increase all allied summons' damage dealt by [[12%]].
When allied summons deal damage to the enemy marked as Nightmare, [[50%]] of the damage dealt ignores all enemy Phys & Magic DEF.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 ATK SPD, 14 Haste.

d: If Aurora's Energy is above [[500]] while she's asleep, she enters a deeper sleep, expanding the range of Plushification to a 3-tile radius.
